desc: Enter your round details and see where you need to improve.

errors.unexpected: An unexpected error occurred. Please try again.

welcomeImages.desktopAlt: Screenshots of the dashboard project showing desktop version
welcomeImages.mobileAlt: Screenshot of the dashboard project showing mobile version

pro.title: Pro Dashboard
pro.description: Choose a player who has granted you access, then open their rounds or statistics in read-only mode.
pro.roundsDescription: Review saved rounds for your selected player.
pro.statsDescription: View strokes gained summaries and recent trends.

stats.title: Shot Distance Stats
stats.subtitle: Built from your latest {{count}} finalised rounds.
stats.choosePlayer: Choose a player to view statistics.
stats.error: Failed to load strokes gained stats.

putting.title: Putting
putting.description: Putting strokes gained grouped by distance.
putting.empty: No putting stats were returned for your latest rounds.

driving.title: Driving
driving.description: Tee-shot strokes gained grouped by distance, including fairways hit.
driving.empty: No driving stats were returned for your latest rounds.

approach.title: Approaches
approach.description: Approach strokes gained grouped by distance.
approach.empty: No approach stats were returned for your latest rounds.

chipping.title: Chipping
chipping.description: Chipping strokes gained from 1 to 30 grouped by distance.
chipping.empty: No chipping stats were returned for your latest rounds.

selectedStats.title: Round Analysis
selectedStats.description: Select finalised rounds to compare a custom set of statistics.
selectedStats.selectionHint: Click a round to include or remove it.
selectedStats.resultsDescription: These charts and tables use only the rounds selected above.
selectedStats.emptySelection: Select one or more rounds to show statistics.

rounds.title: Rounds
rounds.choosePlayer: Choose a player to view rounds.
rounds.roundsDescription: View your latest 30 rounds in one place.
rounds.noRounds: No rounds found. Start a new round to see it here.
rounds.completeDescription: Continue entering holes, or finalise the round with the holes you have already completed.
rounds.completeRoundDescription: Continue entering holes, or finalise the round with the holes you have already completed.

errors.deleteMissing: Failed to delete round: no matching round was deleted.

profile.title: Profile Settings
profile.description: Manage your account details and save changes to your profile.
profile.publicProfileDescription: Update avatar, category, and preferred distance unit.
profile.proAccessDescription: Allow up to 2 pros to view your rounds and statistics in read-only mode.
profile.changePasswordDescription: Enter and confirm your new password.
profile.passwordDescription: A reset link will be sent to your account email address.

state.profileError: Failed to load profile. Please refresh and try again.
state.emailSavingError: Auth email updated, but profile row failed
state.emailSavingMessage: Email update submitted. Check your inbox to confirm the new address.
state.emailNotFound: No email found for this account.

proAccess.error: You can allow up to 2 pros.

signin.title: Welcome back
signin.description: Sign in to view rounds, track strokes gained, and manage your golf profile.
signin.signInDescription: Enter your email and password to continue.

register.title: Create your profile
register.description: Set up your account to track rounds, scorecards, and strokes gained.
register.registerDescription: Fill in your details to create a user account.
register.requestProAccountDescription: Your account will be created as a standard user first. Clive will review the request and approve pro access.
register.logInButton: Already have an account? Log In

resetPassword.title: Reset Password
resetPassword.description: Send a reset link, then set your new password securely.
resetPassword.emailDescription: Enter your account email to receive a reset link.
resetPassword.resetLinkSent: Password reset link sent. Check your email to continue.
resetPassword.passwordLength: Password must be at least 6 characters.
resetPassword.updateSuccess: Password updated successfully. You can now sign in.
resetPassword.updateError: Failed to update password. Please try again.

newRound.title: Start New Round
newRound.description: Choose date, course, and tee to create your scorecard.
newRound.incompleteRoundsDescription: Continue where you left off or delete an unfinished round.
newRound.courseDescription: Search and select a course to load available tees.
newRound.courseLoadSlow: Course data is taking longer than expected to load.
newRound.teeDescription: Select the tee color you played.
newRound.selectCourseForTees: Select a course to view tees.

errors.signInRequired: You must be signed in to start a round.
errors.missingSelection: Select date, course, and tee before starting.
errors.noHoles: No holes found for the selected course.

roundShots.title: Round Shots
roundShots.editShotDescription: Update the shot details and recalculate strokes gained for the round.
roundShots.noShots: No shots found for this round.
roundShots.greenFeetHint: Stored as feet for green shots.

errors.selectedShotMissing: Unable to find the selected shot.
errors.invalidDistance: Enter a valid distance greater than 0.
errors.invalidPenalty: Penalty strokes must be a whole number of 0 or more.
errors.recalculate: Failed to recalculate strokes gained for this round.

scoreEntry.title: Score Entry
scoreEntry.holeSelectionHint: Click a hole number to review or edit the shots already entered for that hole.
scoreEntry.roundCompletedDescription: Mark the round incomplete to edit one or more holes, then complete it again to recalculate strokes gained.
scoreEntry.readyToCompleteDescription: All holes have shots saved. Complete the round to rerun strokes gained with any edits.
scoreEntry.finishingCalculating: Your last hole is saved. We are calculating strokes gained now.
scoreEntry.finishingFinalising: Strokes gained is ready. We are finalising the round.
scoreEntry.finishingSaving: We are saving your final hole.
scoreEntry.markIncompleteToEdit: Mark the round incomplete to edit saved holes from the scorecard.
scoreEntry.noLocalShots: No local shots saved for this hole yet.

roundSummary.title: Round Summary
roundSummary.description: Strokes gained averages plus fairway and GIR counts for this round.

notFound.title: Something's missing.
notFound.description: Sorry, but we are unable to find the page you're looking for. Head back to the dashboard.

admin.title: Admin Panel
admin.description: Control courses, users, and platform tools from a single workspace.

scorecard.importDescription: Upload a CSV scorecard and map distances to existing tee colors.
scorecard.teeWarning: Important: every tee color in the CSV must already exist in the list above. Add missing tees before importing.
scorecard.metresWarning: Very Important: Load scorecard distances in metres!
scorecard.addTeePrompt: Add a new tee before import?
scorecard.csvRulesDescription: First row is the header: start with

strokesExpectation.categoriesDescription: Update the category code and name values used by the expectations data.
strokesExpectation.strokesGainedDescription: Review the expectation ranges used for strokes gained: yards for tee-to-green lies and feet on the green.

users.title: User Accounts ({{count}})
users.description: Assign the pro role here. Pros are read-only and can view only players who grant access from their profile.
